summary: An 18 second video set to music with no speech. It opens with a particle-dissolve visual effect (a figure rendered as scattering particles against black) and then shows a handcuffed detainee being walked through a garage by two masked officers in 'POLICE / FUGITIVE OPERATIONS / SPECIAL WEAPONS TEAM' gear, with an armored BearCat vehicle in the background.

script.scene: Particle-dissolve visual effect: a figure rendered as scattering dust and particles against black.
Handcuffed man in a gray shirt, hands cuffed behind his back, walked across a garage floor between two masked officers; armored vehicle behind.
Rear view of an officer whose plate carrier reads 'POLICE' and 'FUGITIVE OPERATIONS' walking the cuffed man toward a black SUV.
The man held between two masked officers in 'POLICE' vests in front of an armored 'SPECIAL WEAPONS TEAM' BearCat; a fire extinguisher and yellow floor lines are visible.
The cuffed man centered between the two masked officers with the armored vehicle filling the background.
